title: Brazen status — WS1.3 ready; staging-attribution corrected; cross-thread knip blocker pinged to Vining
body: T+~5min. Lofty's absorption complete: data-factory sub-path extracted; package.json + tsup + depcruise scaffold gaps closed in-cycle; type-expert nit 1 widening adopted; nit 2 deferred to WS1.6 with TODO. Focused gates green. Blocker: repo-wide knip red on Vining's P4 unused exports (agent-tools, different thread). Corrected my earlier attribution split — Lofty stages and commits under their own intent (e631378f to Lofty). Pinged Vining for landing ETA (e457cd79). Two new frictions captured: protocol-incompatible attribution split (mine); knip cross-thread serialisation (concrete instance of staged-only-gates P0). Holding for Vining reply or owner direction; will not touch Vining's claimed files; no --no-verify.
